creator: dgilbert@velocet.net
text:
>>>>> "Adrian" == Adrian  <acarter@vaix.net> writes:

Adrian> It is possible that bios boot is set to recognize the Quantum
Adrian> as an LBA system.

Adrian> If so reset bios to NORMAL.

It's currently set to 'auto-detect' in the BIOS.  I don't know what
the result of this is (I only have the dmesg output at hand w/o
rebooting), but this is the dmesg output:

wdc1 at 0x170-0x177 irq 15 flags 0xa0ffa0ff on isa
wdc1: unit 0 (wd2): <Maxtor 91360D8>, DMA, 32-bit, multi-block-16
wd2: 12970MB (26563824 sectors), 26353 cyls, 16 heads, 63 S/T, 512 B/S

Why would setting this to 'NORMAL' make a difference to these
transient lockups?

Dave.
